title: Usless File Priview for simply Text files
excerpt:
really sad preview in “File Column” of simply txt files, seams like simply ASCII since 80’s :slight_smile: Can it really be? 
Same usless Preview for files like xlsx too (Why not use Standard Viewing in Office online) be…

posts.author: RePao (René Poalozzi)
posts.cookedHtml:
really sad preview in “File Column” of simply txt files, seams like simply ASCII since 80’s Can it really be?
Same usless Preview for files like xlsx too (Why not use Standard Viewing in Office online) better turn off, where is a switch for that in my User Settings?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi René!

This sounds odd - you should be able to see previews of more than just txt files! Would you be able to reach out to our support team about this here? Or you can send us a DM on any of our social media channels!

Thanks! We’d love to look into this with you!

posts.author: RePao (René Poalozzi)
posts.cookedHtml: of corse i see, but usless bad formated…
